system.description:
Shadow Network is the Investigator discipline for runners who play the long game of relationships. Their value is not in surveillance equipment or database access; it is in the slow accumulation of contacts, favors, and verifiable confidences across every district that matters. A Shadow Network Investigator can name the bouncer, the barista, the second-shift loading dock supervisor, and the one cleaning crew tech who actually has access to the executive floor.

On the job, the Shadow Network Investigator is the runner who arrives with the right name to drop in every room. Their entry feature is Contact Web: once per session, the Investigator may declare that they know a specific minor NPC in a relevant context (security, services, vendors, fixers), establishing an existing relationship that the table accepts as canon.
system.grants: Contact Web: once per session, declare an existing relationship with a relevant minor NPC.

wizard.tagline: Know everyone who matters before walking into the room
